critic_justifications.NY Times: Ben Brantley gave a mixed review, praising the choreography and spectacle but finding the narrative framework uneven and the treatment of Jackson's controversies superficial.
critic_justifications.Variety: Positive review highlighting Christopher Wheeldon's innovative choreography and the impressive production design, though noting some dramatic shortcomings.
critic_justifications.Hollywood Reporter: Favorable assessment of the musical's technical achievements and Jackson's catalog, with appreciation for the dance sequences.
critic_justifications.NY Post: Upbeat review praising the visual spectacle and energy, calling it a crowd-pleasing celebration of Jackson's artistry.
critic_justifications.The Guardian: Critical review questioning the show's approach to Jackson's legacy and controversies, finding it more spectacle than substance.
critic_justifications.Time Out NY: Positive reception of the production values and choreography, with mixed feelings about the narrative structure.
critic_justifications.TheaterMania: Mixed review acknowledging the impressive staging and dance while noting dramatic and thematic limitations.
critic_justifications.Vulture: Skeptical review of the show's treatment of its subject matter, praising technical elements but questioning artistic depth.
critic_justifications.Associated Press: Favorable review emphasizing the spectacular choreography and Jackson's music catalog as the show's strongest elements.
critic_justifications.BroadwayWorld: Generally positive reception highlighting the production's ambition and entertainment value with some reservations about storytelling.

audience_justifications.Show-Score: Audience consensus has been strongly positive, with high marks for spectacle and entertainment value, though some viewers noted narrative concerns.
audience_justifications.Broadway Scorecard: Audiences have given the show solid approval ratings, appreciating the production design and Jackson's music catalog.
audience_justifications.Broadway.com: Community ratings reflect strong audience enthusiasm for the visual and musical elements, with generally favorable reception.
